Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Approving Receiver'S Final Account And Report, Discharging Receiver, Exonerating Receiver'S Bond, Disssolving Prelim Injunction, Terminatin Receivership And Directing Payment Of Receivership Deficit;
Off Calendar Apr-02-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mia S. Blackler, Esq. of Buchalter Nemer, (415-227-0900), for JP Morgan Chase Bank, NA, Plaintiff and moving party.
No appearance by Defendant and opposing party.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF JP MORGAN CHASE BANK,N.A.'S Motion For Order Approving Receiver's Final Account And Report, Discharging Receiver, Exonerating Receiver's Bond, Dissolving Preliminary Injunction, Terminating Receivership And Directing Payment Of Receivership Deficit is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Order is signed in open court. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

Off Calendar Dec-03-2013 Continued To Dec-11-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:Attorney Mia S. Blackler for Plaintiff, Jp Morgan Chase Bank, N.A. / Mr. Fong for Defendant Katherine A. Fong.

The Court has continued the matter in Order To Show Cause Why Receiver Should Not Be Appointed to December 11, 2013 at 9:30 a.m. The Temorary Restraining Order remains in place. Movng party is to submit an order regarding continuance and TRO. Opposition is to be filed by 9 a.m. on Decmber 09, 2013. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)
